negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_068
prompt: A close-up shot of a coffee roasting machine captures the intricate process of roasting coffee beans. The dimly lit environment highlights the metallic drum, which reflects the primary light source, creating a warm glow over the dark brown coffee beans inside. The cylindrical drum, likely made of stainless steel, features a partially open transparent lid that offers a clear view of the beans. A central metallic mechanism with two outward-extending arms rotates slowly, ensuring even stirring. The beans are spread across the drum's surface, their rich, warm tones contrasting sharply with the darker surroundings. As the video progresses, the continuous movement of the rotating arms maintains the roasting process, with the beans shifting slightly within the drum. The final frame shows the machine still in motion, emphasizing the systematic roasting process in a professional setting.
